steps.t: Drambor has asked you to search for his missing pack at one of the waterfalls between the beacons and Calembel. The waterfalls are in southern Lamedon…
Near a crashing waterfall, you discovered Drambor's missing pack. You should pick up the pack before it gets chewed on any further. The pack is in Lam…
At the foot of a waterfall, surrounded by deadly avanc, you found Drambor's missing pack. You should bring the pack to Drambor in Calembel.
